hero.label: Made for Dex
hero.headline: I want to build Dex into the relationship operating system everyone uses.
hero.subheadline: Dex solves a problem I see everywhere: people losing touch with their networks because there's no system for it. Kevin built something thousands of people pay for, and now it's the moment to scale. I've spent the last year proving I can acquire customers and drive growth, and I'm ready to do it for a product I genuinely believe in.

whyCompany.title: Dex solves a real, universal problem with proven product-market fit
whyCompany.body: Kevin didn't build Dex to chase a trend. He built it because he was losing touch with people he cared about. After 5 years, thousands of paying customers prove this isn't a niche want. That kind of organic, problem-first origin is exactly what makes a company worth joining early.

whyCompany.title: This is the moment before the inflection point
whyCompany.body: Dex has product-market fit and a small, focused team of 7. The hiring of a Founding Growth Lead signals Kevin is ready to scale. Being employee 8 in a YC S19 company at the growth inflection point is the rarest opportunity.

whyCompany.title: My BDR and marketing experience maps directly onto this role
whyCompany.body: I spent 14 months at Copygen.ai doing cold outreach, building LinkedIn sequences, and acquiring 15-20 paying customers. Then I moved into B2B growth at NextAfter in the fundraising space. I know how to find users, talk to them, and convert them. Dex needs exactly that right now.

quote: I've spent a year learning how to acquire customers. Now I want to do it for something I actually use and believe in.
